data.description: Test 20 (test_security_blue_team_dispatched_after_red_team) uses DSO_SYSTEM env var inspection in its mock curl to detect dispatched reviewer agent, but Tests 13-16 use --data-raw body grep for the same purpose. When the GREEN implementation is built, the blue-team test mock will need a detection mechanism consistent with how the runner actually passes agent identity. Filed from code review finding [1] (minor/verification).
data.title: test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh: Test 20 agent-identity detection uses DSO_SYSTEM env var inconsistent with tests 13-16 --data-raw strategy
